annotations.comment: Great draft! You have so many ideas to explore and a plethora of potential meaningful ideas to develop, though I definitely see repetitions, images, moments, etc. coalescing around a couple of different ideas. Let's explore them! Nice voice and tone. A lot of heat and energy bubbling beneath the surface :) Let's talk about your essay's "center of gravity" and the "so what" question so that you can more intentionally develop what's really at the heart of your essay (and then "map" a full set of big ideas). Also, don't forget about the poem! And don't forget to use an intentional introduction and conclusion form using one of the options available on our Canvas site. Keep up the good work!
